content:
Hey, Caio! 👋 Great to see you!

Ready to practice? **What have you been up to lately?** Tell me in English — no worries about mistakes! 😊
tem uma gíria em português que é 'based'. exemplo: totalmente based, o que seria em inglês?

Ótimo! 👍 Quick switch to English though — let's keep our brain in English mode! 🧠

So **"based"** in English actually works the *same way*! It means **authentic, true to yourself, unapologetic** — super popular in Gen Z culture.

Examples:
- *"That's totally based."* = That's totally real/authentic.
- *"She's so based."* = She's confident, doesn't care what others think.

It comes from hip-hop/internet culture and now it's everywhere on TikTok, Reddit, etc.

**Quick question:** Have you heard native speakers using it on social media? What was the context? 😄

🎙️ [Áudio: 'ANAVITÓRIA_ Vitor Kley - Pupila(MP3_160K).mp3']
How I'm going to say to her that I like your face It's just your hair that she makes my hair dilapidated I want to say to her that the river has made its effect Now I'm going to kiss her just she makes my hair dilapidated You know, after I met you it was difficult to live I stay here imagining things with you I saw our appearance Is that the story of you thinking well with you with you with your face of your face dilapidated You know, after I met you I want to talk to you that we're just going to be together but I see you I see you You know, I don't have the time to try I sell my house to you I sell my house to you I don't know what I do I want more I want more How I'm going to say to her that I like your face It's done, it's done Here we see all the models of Latin America These are famous plants in the whole world and even other plants You know, guys This is a tea made by people This is a cura when people don't see it and this one is the most important This one you engrave from the bottom of your heart and engrave It's something crazy

Caio, I appreciate you sharing this, but **that transcription doesn't match the song at all!** 😅 

The lyrics are *very* garbled — it looks like automatic speech-to-text went a bit wild. The actual song "Pupila" by Ana Vitória & Vitor Kley is about **admiration and attraction**, but the words here are all mixed up.

**Here's my question:** What do you *want* to work on?

1. **Listen & understand** the real lyrics?
2. **Discuss vocabulary** from the actual song?
3. **Practice describing feelings** in English (like the song theme)?

Let me know, and we'll nail it! 🎵

🎙️ [Áudio: 'ANAVITÓRIA_ Vitor Kley - Pupila(MP3_160K).mp3']
How I'm going to say to her that I like your face It's just your hair that she makes my hair dilapidated I want to say to her that the river has made its effect Now I'm going to kiss her just she makes my hair dilapidated You know, after I met you it was difficult to live I stay here imagining things with you I saw our appearance Is that the story of you thinking well with you with you with your face of your face dilapidated You know, after I met you I want to talk to you that we're just going to be together but I see you I see you You know, I don't have the time to try I sell my house to you I sell my house to you I don't know what I do I want more I want more How I'm going to say to her that I like your face It's done, it's done Here we see all the models of Latin America These are famous plants in the whole world and even other plants You know, guys This is a tea made by people This is a cura when people don't see it and this one is the most important This one you engrave from the bottom of your heart and engrave It's something crazy

Caio, I see the same transcription again — **it's still not accurate**. 😅

Here's the thing: that auto-generated text has **major errors** ("dilapidated," "sell my house," "cura," etc.) that don't match the real song at all.

**Instead, let's try this:**

1. **Tell me in your own words** — What's the song *about*? (Love? Attraction? A memory?)
2. **Pick ONE phrase** you heard and want to understand
3. **Or** — let's talk about *how to describe feelings* in English (which is what this song does!)

What works better for you? 🎵

🎙️ [Áudio: 'ANAVITÓRIA_ Vitor Kley - Pupila(MP3_160K).mp3']
How I'm going to say to her that I like your face It's just your hair that she makes my hair dilapidated I want to say to her that the river has made its effect Now I'm going to kiss her just she makes my hair dilapidated You know, after I met you it was difficult to live I stay here imagining things with you I saw our appearance Is that the story of you thinking well with you with you with your face of your face dilapidated You know, after I met you I want to talk to you that we're just going to be together but I see you I see you You know, I don't have the time to try I sell my house to you I sell my house to you I don't know what I do I want more I want more How I'm going to say to her that I like your face It's done, it's done Here we see all the models of Latin America These are famous plants in the whole world and even other plants You know, guys This is a tea made by people This is a cura when people don't see it and this one is the most important This one you engrave from the bottom of your heart and engrave It's something crazy

Caio, I notice you've sent the same transcription three times now. 🤔

**Here's what I'm thinking:** Either the audio file isn't uploading correctly, *or* the auto-transcription tool is really struggling with this song.

**Let's pivot!** Instead of fighting the tech, how about we:

✅ **Talk about the song's *theme*** — expressing attraction & emotion in English
✅ **Practice phrases** like *"How can I tell her...?"* or *"Since I met you..."*
✅ **Work on YOUR speaking** — describe someone or a moment that moved you

**Which interests you most?** 😊

🎙️ [Áudio: 'ANAVITÓRIA_ Vitor Kley - Pupila(MP3_160K).mp3']
How I'm going to say to her that I like your face It's just your hair that she makes my hair dilapidated I want to say to her that the river has made its effect Now I'm going to kiss her just she makes my hair dilapidated You know, after I met you it was difficult to live I stay here imagining things with you I saw our appearance Is that the story of you thinking well with you with you with your face of your face dilapidated You know, after I met you I want to talk to you that we're just going to be together but I see you I see you You know, I don't have the time to try I sell my house to you I sell my house to you I don't know what I do I want more I want more How I'm going to say to her that I like your face It's done, it's done Here we see all the models of Latin America These are famous plants in the whole world and even other plants You know, guys This is a tea made by people This is a cura when people don't see it and this one is the most important This one you engrave from the bottom of your heart and engrave It's something crazy

Caio, I appreciate your persistence! 😊 But I notice this keeps repeating, and honestly, **that transcription isn't helping us learn**.

Here's what I can do:

✅ Teach you **real phrases** from the song's *theme* (expressing feelings, attraction)
✅ Help you **understand song lyrics** when we use accurate text
✅ Practice **conversation** about music, relationships, or anything you want!

**But right now, let's reset:** 🎯

**Tell me — what's ONE thing you want to improve in English this week?** 
- Speaking confidence?
- Vocabulary?
- Understanding native speakers?
- Something else?

Let's focus there instead! 💪
